title: Important Update: TDS Certificate Due Date for Q3 FY 2025-26 Extended!
content:
# Important Update: TDS Certificate Due Date for Q3 FY 2025-26 Extended!

Ek important update hai! Government ne Financial Year 2025-26 ke third quarter (October to December 2025) ke liye TDS certificates issue karne ki last date extend kar di hai. The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne yeh extension income tax e-filing portal par technical glitches ke karan hone wali genuine hardships ko dekhte hue diya hai.

Here are the key details:
*   **Quarter Affected:** Financial Year 2025-26, Quarter 3 (ending December 31, 2025)
*   **Original Due Date:** Typically, January 30, 2026 (for Form 16A TDS certificates).
*   **New Due Date:** March 31, 2026
*   **Reason for Extension:** Deductors ko income tax e-filing portal par technical issues ki wajah se certificates generate aur issue karne mein mushkil ho rahi thi.
*   **Official Communication:** Yeh extension CBDT ne Circular No. 2/2026 dated March 26, 2026, ke through announce kiya hai.
*   **Clarification:** Jo TDS certificates is extended timeline tak, yaani March 31, 2026 tak issue kiye jayenge, unhe prescribed due date ke andar hi mana jayega.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the Official Circulars Section of Income Tax Department here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/news/circulars-notifications)

*Published on: 27 March 2026*
